User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the RoleVerify application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: User's role in the application (player, staff, or responsible).

emailVerified.description: Indicates whether the user's email address has been verified.

clubId.description: Reference to Club. (Relationship: User 1:1 Club) Nullable if the user is not a 'responsible' or the club has not yet been created.

teamId.description: The ID of the team the user belongs to.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Represents a club managed within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Club entity.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the club.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a team within a club.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

clubId.description: The ID of the club this team belongs to.

invitationCode.description: A unique code to join the team.

WellnessScore.title: WellnessScore
WellnessScore.description: Represents a player's daily wellness scores, generated by the AI buddy.

id.description: The date of the score entry in YYYY-MM-DD format.

summary.description: An AI-generated summary of the conversation for that day.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a daily chat session between a user and the AI buddy.

id.description: The ID of the chat session, typically the date (YYYY-MM-DD).

userId.description: The ID of the user participating in the chat.

date.description: The date of the chat session.

summary.description: An AI-generated summary of the conversation.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat session.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Represents an alert triggered by the AI based on a user's message.

userId.description: The ID of the user who triggered the alert.

date.description: The date the alert was triggered.

triggeringMessage.description: The message that triggered the alert.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the alert was created.

PlayerUpdate.title: PlayerUpdate
PlayerUpdate.description: Represents an insightful update or 'weetje' for a player, comparing their data to the team average.

content.description: The detailed content of the update.

date.description: The date the update was generated.

TeamSummary.title: TeamSummary
TeamSummary.description: Represents an aggregated summary of a team's wellness scores.

id.description: Unique identifier for the summary, e.g., 'weekly-2024-20'.

definition.description: Stores user data, including role and email verification status. Uses path-based ownership for private user data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores daily wellness scores for a specific user.
Stores daily chat sessions for a user.
Stores individual messages within a chat session.
Stores alerts triggered for a specific user.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique ID of the alert.

definition.description: Stores generated insights and updates for a player.

params.name: updateId
params.description: The unique ID of the update.

definition.description: Stores club data. Club is 1:1 with the User, which contains the clubId.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club.

definition.description: Stores team data as a subcollection of a club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique identifier of the team.

definition.description: Stores aggregated wellness summaries for a team.

firestore.reasoning: This design prioritizes security and scalability for the RoleVerify application. User data is stored under `/users/{userId}` ensuring clear ownership and simplifying security rules. The `User` document contains the role information, eliminating the need for custom claims or separate role collections. Email verification status is also stored directly within the `User` document. The Club data is stored under `/clubs/{clubId}` with a one-to-one link to a `User` stored in the `User` document. Since only 'responsible' users create clubs, checking for the club's existence via the `clubId` in the user document is sufficient. The key to authorization independence here is the denormalization of the club id in the `User` document. This avoids needing to read the `Club` document to determine a user's authorization context. This supports the QAPs because list operations are secured by path based rules and no role information needs to be checked in the rules, simplifying and securing list operations. Teams are a subcollection of clubs, enforcing a clear hierarchy. Chat messages, wellness scores, alerts and player updates are stored in subcollections under the user, ensuring data privacy and easy retrieval. Team summaries are stored under the team, allowing for aggregated analysis.
